creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Thank you for the quick fix in the ports! Rebuilding updated port fixes the issue :-)

However I also notice functional problems with this Firefox on various sites, like hanging after login, not following the internal redirections and updates, etc. Probably some other internals also changed and there is a silent compatibility problem. Removing site data (cookies and local store) fixes the issue.

Thank you :-)
